parameters: \p2\}Sh... I think I hear the Dandy Toads inside.
\ctoadWho are you people? Let's get out of here!
you so much. I am in your debt.
\solOh, my friend sent you! I should get
back to him! He must be worried sick!
\solOnce I figure out where I am...
\-So who do you think you are, trying to
barge into my tent like that?
\p2Hey, hey, calm down. We're just travelers
\-Well, in any case, I'm not looking
to make friends... but I'll bite.
\p2We were just thinking about setting up our
tents nearby. Y'know, for safety reasons.
\-What, you think I can't take care of myself?
\p2That's not what I'm trying to say...
\p2She's a little... off-putting. At least we can camp out here.
Sleep in a bed to pass the night.
\p2Look! There's a tent set up! We
\sailWant a ride? You'll have to ask the boss.
\bigWe still gud. Dere ain't any goodie-two
shoes showin' up jus' yet... but
wus' takin' the baws so long?
\smartDo you not recall that he instructed us
to remain outside with any objects he has
pilfered? Besides, he is a master thief.
I am positive that he shall be fine.
\smartOn the other hand, I am not completely
sure that we'll be safe here.
\smartHm? Now what could this possibly be?
\bigWe be robbin' a tent. Wha'else would we be doin'?
\smartA rhetorical question is asked in order to
produce an effect or to make a statement rather
\bigOhhh! Yea', I know whatcha mean now!
\kevWhat's the hold u- oh. It's you two
again. I guess you forgot my warning.
\kevIt's funny that you think you can do
anything. You barely stopped us last
time, and you don't have a soldier to
do the job for you this time around.
\kevWhy are you even bothering to help
this person? You don't even know them!
\p2Good question... honestly, we just don't really like you.
\kevWell, if you're looking for a fight, I'll give you one!
And I've learned from my mistake - never let a
dumb lackey do a master thief's work.
smart lackey to do my work!
\-You steal my things, then expect me to just
sit and cry while some losers take care of
you? No! I'm going to fight for myself!
\kevWell then... Smart Mouth, I'm sure you
can take on 3 people at once, right?
\-You guys don't look too capable. It's
a good thing I got here just in time.
\kevYou idiot... you're almost as dumb as Big Mouth.
\kevI'd take care of you twats myself, but I just had this
jacket ironed. Next time, you won't be so lucky!
\-I hate to say this, but... thank you
for the help. I appreciate it.
\p2Hey, any reason to beat up those losers, am I right?
Besides, I would've wanted you to do the same
if I was in that situation.
\p2\N[1] has your stuff, by the way...
\p3I'm \N[3], a traveling cleric. Been out on The Trail a
lil' while now... it's a lot more fighting Banditos
than the introspective journey I was looking for.
\p2I feel you, we're more interested in fighting
monsters than some ne'er-do-wells. But hey,
whatever gets us to Haven Harbor!
\p3Haven Harbor, you say? I've heard talk of the place...
Adon's capital of trade, a port town so rich even
the limestones glisten like gold. Boating, fishing,
and numerous shops... an adventurer's dream.
\p2So you get what I'm talking about!
\p3Yeah, for sure. I'd love to see that place too!
\p3Are you going there for anything specific?
\p2Uh... yeah, actually. It's a little crazy though...
\p3You mean the \c[18]Merchant of Terror\c[0]? \c[18]Slayer of Gods\c[0]?
The one and only true \c[18]King of Monsters\c[0]?
\p3I have heard of the villages \c[18]he\c[0] has leveled. The
horrors \c[18]he\c[0] has inflicted upon humanity. How \c[18]his\c[0]
legions made a river run red with blood for a week.
\p3These cannot just be rumors, for how can such
exaggerated bloodshed be founded on lies?
\p3I see now... you are Trailia's holy warriors,
just as I am. We fight the same cause.
\p3No, I understand. You intend to reach Haven Harbor
and learn more about this \c[18]beast\c[0] who threatens not
only our species, but the very gods themselves.
And I would like to accomplish the same.
\p3Well, the two of us started out when we realized
we're going the same way, so if you really intend
to make it all the way to Haven Harbor with us...
\p3...then you can come along for the ride!
\p3My pleasure. My holy staff will guide us to victory.
\p3Anyways, it's been a long night. Why don't we get
some rest before setting out for Haven Harbor?
\p2Alright, the tent is all packed up!
\p3Mine can stay here... it was an old model, anyway.
As you look at the burning wood in front of you,
you notice a \ii[2] in there that's somehow
You have no idea how it got there, but (against
your better judgement) you pick it up anyways.
